vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Drawing has been part and parcel of my daily routine since I was a toddler.

vocab.meaning: trở thành bản năng, kỹ năng thuần thục
vocab.example: Playing the violin is second nature to me now, as I've been practicing it since I was five.

vocab.meaning: trở nên say mê điều gì đó
vocab.example: I got the bug for photography during a primary school trip and I've been inseparable from my camera ever since.

vocab.meaning: người cực kỳ khao khát/đam mê (thường là kiến thức hoặc hoạt động khó)
vocab.example: I've always been a glutton for historical novels, a habit that started in my early childhood.

vocab.meaning: trải qua mọi thăng trầm/khó khăn
vocab.example: My passion for football has stayed with me through thick and thin, from childhood games to local leagues today.
Ever since I was a kid, I’ve been able to lose track of time whenever I’m immersed in building Lego sets.

vocab.meaning: di truyền/là truyền thống của gia đình
vocab.example: My love for woodworking runs in the family; I started learning the basics in my father's workshop at age ten.

vocab.meaning: đã ngấm vào máu/là bản chất tự nhiên
vocab.example: Singing is in my blood—I was performing at school concerts long before I could even read music.
I've always had a flair for chess, having spent countless hours playing against my grandfather as a young boy.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui sướng lớn lao trong việc gì
vocab.example: I still take great delight in collecting rare coins, a hobby that began with a single gift from my uncle years ago.
